---
title: 'Amanda: Unified Instrumentation Framework for Deep Neural Networks'
author:
- Yue Guan
- Yuxian Qiu
- Jingwen Leng
- Fan Yang
- Shuo Yu
- Yunxin Liu
- Yu Feng
- Yuhao Zhu
- Lidong Zhou
- Yun Liang
- Chen Zhang
- Chao Li
- Minyi Guo
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/asplos24-amanda.pdf
code_source: https://github.com/uchuhimo/amanda
journ: ASPLOS
year: 2024
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 78
---
